overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character exploring a desert outlaw camp at night, followed by a hard transition to daytime wilderness. The character walks through a campsite with tents and campfires under a full moon, then runs along a desert trail through 'Repentance Rock' under bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert outlaw camp with canvas tents and campfire

events.description: character turns right to circle around the central campfire
character pauses briefly then continues walking past tents

agents.ego_description: walking through the desert camp, examining tents and campfire areas, circling around the central fire pit with hanging pot

entered.detail: beige canvas tent with wooden support poles
wooden tripod structure with hanging cast iron pot over burning embers
stacked wooden supply crates and boxes
dark rocky terrain formations surrounding the camp
bright full moon visible in night sky

segments.scene_description: The character explores a desert outlaw camp at night, walking past canvas tents and wooden crates. A campfire burns under a tripod with a hanging pot, casting flickering light as the character circles around the fire pit and examines the surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert wilderness trail through rocky terrain

events.description: hard cut transition from night camp to bright daytime desert wilderness
character breaks into a run along the dirt path
location text 'REPENTANCE ROCK' appears at top of screen

agents.ego_description: jogging and running along a desert trail, navigating through brush and cacti toward large rock formations under bright sun

entered.detail: sandy dirt path winding through desert terrain
tall reddish-brown rock outcroppings and boulders
scattered cacti, dry bushes, and desert shrubs lining the path
bright sun creating lens flare in clear blue sky

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bright sunny day in the desert wilderness. The character runs along a dirt trail surrounded by cacti and rock formations, passing through an area marked as 'Repentance Rock' while the sun shines intensely overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that shifts from a moonlit outlaw camp at night into a bright, sun-drenched desert wilderness. It begins with the character exploring a campsite, weaving past canvas tents and wooden crates while circling a flickering campfire with a hanging pot. As the environment abruptly transforms, the nocturnal shadows vanish to reveal an intense overhead sun illuminating a vast open landscape. The scene then expands as the character runs along a dirt trail flanked by cacti and jagged rock formations, passing through the area known as Repentance Rock under the brilliant daylight.
